name: Sokonumber
description: Sokonumber is a free online game for boys which is full of leisure and puzzle. The game is simple and fresh, and there are more levels waiting for you to unlock. It is fascinating, and you can have lasting fun by simply operating it. Drag the digital bricks to different tracks, and the bricks with the same number will automatically correspond. Note that you can move all the bricks at once. Come and try it!
tags: 3D, Android, Block, Boy, Brain, Bricks, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Matching, Number, Online, Puzzle, Skill
